symbols.name: EntityFrameworkFileStorageProvider
symbols.summary: Provides the foundation surface for an Entity Framework backed BridgingIT.DevKit.Application.Storage.IFileStorageProvider.

syntax.content: public class EntityFrameworkFileStorageProvider : BaseFileStorageProvider, IFileStorageProvider where TContext : DbContext, IFileStorageContext

symbols.name: FileExistsAsync(string, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Checks if a file or blob exists at the specified path, returning a Result with success or failure and errors. Example: `var result = await provider.ExistsAsync("folder/file.txt", null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("File exists");`

syntax.content: public override Task FileExistsAsync(string path, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to check (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileSystemError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to check (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileSystemError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: ReadFileAsync(string, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Opens a readable stream for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with the stream or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.ReadFileAsync("folder/file.txt", null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) using (var stream = result.Value) { /* Read stream */ }`

Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to the file (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., FileNotFoundError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: WriteFileAsync(string, Stream, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Writes the provided stream to the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with success or errors. Example: `using (var stream = new MemoryStream()) await provider.WriteFileAsync("folder/file.txt", stream, null, CancellationToken.None);`

Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DiskFullError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: OpenWriteFileAsync(string, bool, IProgress, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Opens a writable stream for the file or blob at the specified path, returning a Result with the stream or errors. Opening failures are returned in the result; write, flush, and dispose failures surface from the returned stream. Example: `var result = await provider.OpenWriteFileAsync("folder/file.txt", false, null, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) await using (var stream = result.Value) { /* Write to stream */ }`

syntax.content: public override Task> OpenWriteFileAsync(string path, bool useTemporaryWrite = false, IProgress progress = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The path to write to (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Whether the provider should stage writes in a temporary file/blob and publish on successful close.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the writable stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DiskFullError, PermissionError).

parameters.description: The path to write to (e.g., "folder/file.txt").
Whether the provider should stage writes in a temporary file/blob and publish on successful close.
Optional progress reporter for tracking bytes and files processed.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the writable stream on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., DiskFullError, PermissionError).

symbols.name: RenameDirectoryAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Renames a directory from the specified source path to the destination path asynchronously.
symbols.remarks: This method performs the renaming operation asynchronously and does not block the calling thread. Ensure that both path and destinationPath are valid and accessible paths.

syntax.content: public override Task RenameDirectoryAsync(string path, string destinationPath, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The full path of the directory to be renamed. Cannot be null or empty.
The new full path for the directory. Cannot be null or empty.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests. Defaults to default.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result object indicating the success or failure of the operation. The result contains details about any errors encountered during the renaming process.

parameters.description: The full path of the directory to be renamed. Cannot be null or empty.
The new full path for the directory. Cannot be null or empty.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests. Defaults to default.

returns.description: A BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result object indicating the success or failure of the operation. The result contains details about any errors encountered during the renaming process.

symbols.name: ListDirectoriesAsync(string, string, bool, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Lists directories matching the search pattern under the specified path, returning a Result with the directory list or errors. Example: `var result = await provider.ListDirectoriesAsync("folder/", "*sub*", true, CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) foreach (var dir in result.Value) Console.WriteLine(dir);`

Whether to include subdirectories.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.

returns.description: A Result containing the directory list on success or failure with typed errors (e.g., AccessDeniedError, FileSystemError).

symbols.name: CheckHealthAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Checks connectivity and basic access to the storage location, returning a Result with success or errors. Returns false if the location is unreachable or permissions are insufficient, triggering a health alert. Example: `var result = await provider.CheckHealthAsync(CancellationToken.None); if (result.IsSuccess) Console.WriteLine("Storage is healthy");`

syntax.content: public override Task CheckHealthAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

returns.description: A Result indicating success or failure with typed errors (e.g., ConnectionError, PermissionError).
